name: Aaronson's Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 large New potatoes, cut into 1/8-inch slices
1 cup Fresh string beans, cut into 1-1/2 inch cubes
4 Carrots, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large Dutch oven until very hot and add the beef cubes.
2. Sear the beef, turning when browned all over.
3. Add the red onions and garlic to the pot and sauté for a minute or two with the beef.
4. Add the wine and allow it to cook on high heat for one minute.
5. Lower the heat to just above a simmer and add the tomatoes.
6. Stir to incorporate the ingredients in the tomatoes.
7. Add the rest of the ingredients, except the salt and pepper, and give them a few good stirs.
8. Cook for about 2 hours, or until the beef is tender. Stir frequently.
9. Check often to ensure there is liquid in the pot. If it dries out, add water, 1/2 cup at a time.
10. Cook with the pot partially covered for the entire cooking time.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning with herbs, salt, and pepper before enjoying.
